zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Beaumont於1380年5月11日出生在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆 煙雨 勞頓時，他的父親Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter19歲，母親Katherine de Everingham13歲。他於1402年與Elizabeth Willoughby在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1413年6月在英國林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普享年33歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Beaumont于1380年5月11日出生在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆 煙雨 勞頓时，他的父亲Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter19岁，母亲Katherine de Everingham13岁。他于1402年与Elizabeth Willoughby在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1413年6月在英国林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普享年33岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾謝普林加姆 煙雨 波頓 安德 比爾索普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Beaumont was born on 11 May 1380, in Folkingham with Laughton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter, was 19 and his mother, Katherine de Everingham, was 13. He married Elizabeth Willoughby in 1402, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in June 1413, in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Beaumont est né le 11 mai 1380, à Folkingham with Laughton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Katherine d’Everingham, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Willoughby en 1402, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1413, à Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Beaumont am 11. Mai 1380 in Folkingham with Laughton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter 19 und seine Mutter Katherine de Everingham 13. Er hat 1402 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England Elizabeth Willoughby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1413 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Beaumont è nato il il 11 maggio 1380 nel Folkingham with Laughton, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Everingham, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Willoughby nel 1402, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1413, nel Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Beaumontが1380年5月11日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガム ウィス ラウトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garterは19歳，母Katherine de Everinghamは13歳であった。1402年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムでElizabeth Willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1413年6月にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアセンプリンガム ウィス ポイントン アンド バーソルペで33歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアセンプリンガム ウィス ポイントン アンド バーソルペにて埋葬された。

ko.Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe,: 영국 링코실르 젬프링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소
ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Beaumont(이)가 1380년 5월 11일 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함 위스 로그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Everingham(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1402년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 Elizabeth Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1413년 6월 영국 링코실르 젬프링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 젬프링함 위스 포인턴 앤드 비르소에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Beaumont nasceu em 11 de maio de 1380, em Folkingham with Laughton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Everingham, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Willoughby em 1402, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em junho de 1413, em Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe,: семпрингхам вит поинтон анд биртаурп, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Beaumont родился 11 мая 1380 г. в местности фолкингхам вит лотон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Beaumont 4th Baron Beaumont Knight Of The Garter было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Everingham, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Willoughby в 1402 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер июнь 1413 г. в местности семпрингхам вит поинтон анд биртаурп, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности семпрингхам вит поинтон анд биртаурп, линколншир, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Willoughby en 1402, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en junio de 1413, en Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Sempringham with Pointon and Birthorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
